operations.purpose: Clear and lay courtyard ground to coarse_dirt within footprint
Stonebrick low perimeter foundation (1-high) around outer edge of structure footprint
Main hall floor layer (wood planks) inset 1 from foundation
Secondary subfloor (stone) under walkway center for visual banding (y=0 already coarse_dirt left) - 1 block depth under slabs where walkway placed
Build main hall walls: layered horizontal bands. Lower band (stonebrick) y=2, from x=2..18 z=2..30
Upper band (stone_slab face using stonebrick blocks as solid) y=5
Main hall parapet/top wall (oak planks) y=6
Entrance opening at front center: 3 wide x 3 high opening in wall centered on front face (z=2 side). Creates entrance gap through bands from y=2..4 and topped to y=6 as open arch.
Fill tower interiors with oak planks (inside the log shell) leaving internal space for floors
